\begin{equation}
E(x)=\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}}{n}
\end{equation}

\begin{align}
E(x) & =\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}}{n}\\
 & =\frac{x_{1}+x_{2}+...+x_{n}}{n}
\end{align}
